emails.subject: centana
emails.body: centana in case you care. I agreed with Centana to sell the 748552mmbtu tomorrow morning. so lets hope some lawyer doesn't get in the way

emails.subject: RE: centana
emails.body: RE: centana price? To: Zisman, Stuart

emails.subject: RE: centana
emails.body: Thanks i almost gave it away. To: Parks, Joe

emails.subject: FW: Centana
emails.body: FW: Centana Joe, I promised Chip something in writing by lunchtime tomorrow. Please let me know if you can't be done by then. If memory serves me there wasn't much more that needed to be done. Stuart

emails.subject: RE: Centana
emails.body: RE: Centana you let me have access to girl man Myers?

emails.subject: Centana
emails.body: Waiting for a phone call from Centana. Might have to put the gloves on.

emails.subject: FW: Centana
emails.body: FW: Centana To: Schneider, Chip; Zisman, Stuart
